da.hero_subtitle: Lær de passionerede yogalærere og mentorer bag Yoga Bible at kende. Hvert teammedlem bringer årtiers erfaring, dedikation og en unik tilgang til din yogarejse.
da.intro_text: Hos Yoga Bible tror vi på, at en fantastisk underviser kan forvandle din praksis. Vores team er sammensat af erfarne yogalærere med unikke specialer — fra vinyasa flow til yin yoga, fra pranayama til filosofi. Hver underviser bringer autentisk viden, varme og et dybt engagement i din udvikling.
da.teacher1_bio: Sarah grundlagde Yoga Bible med en vision om at skabe en autentisk, dybdegående yogauddannelse i hjertet af København. Hendes undervisning kombinerer klassisk yogafilosofi med moderne bevægelseslære, og hun er kendt for sin evne til at gøre komplekse koncepter tilgængelige for alle.
da.teacher1_quote: Yoga handler ikke om at røre dine tæer — det handler om hvad du lærer på vejen ned.
da.teacher1_img_alt: Sarah Jensen — Lead Instructor hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher2_bio: Mikkel bringer en unik kombination af yogavisdom og anatomisk ekspertise til holdet. Med en baggrund inden for fysioterapi sikrer han, at hver elev forstår kroppens mekanik og kan undervise sikkert og effektivt. Hans yin yoga-timer er legendariske.
da.teacher2_quote: Når du forstår kroppen, forstår du bevægelsen. Når du forstår bevægelsen, finder du friheden.
da.teacher2_img_alt: Mikkel Andersen — Senior Teacher hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher3_bio: Priya voksede op i en yogafamilie i Rishikesh og har praktiseret pranayama og meditation siden barndommen. Hun bringer dyb autenticitet og generationers visdom til sin undervisning og guider eleverne ind i åndedrættets transformative kraft.
da.teacher3_quote: Åndedrættet er broen mellem krop og sind. Mestre åndedrættet, og du mestrer dig selv.
da.teacher3_img_alt: Priya Sharma — Pranayama-specialist hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher4_bio: Jonas er manden bag Yoga Bibles populære inversions- og handstand-kurser. Med en baggrund inden for cirkuskunst og akrobatik underviser han med humor, præcision og en smittende entusiasme, der får selv de mest nervøse elever til at vove sig op på hovedet.
da.teacher4_quote: At vende verdenen på hovedet ændrer ikke bare dit perspektiv — det ændrer dig.
da.teacher4_img_alt: Jonas Berg — Inversions-specialist hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher5_bio: Line skaber rum for dyb afslapning og indre ro. Hendes restorative timer og yoga nidra-sessioner er en perfekt modvægt til hverdagens stress. Hun leder også Yoga Bibles eftertragede retreat-programmer og guider deltagerne mod en dybere forbindelse med sig selv.
da.teacher5_quote: I stilheden finder vi den visdom, som støjen skjuler.
da.teacher5_img_alt: Line Frederiksen — Restorative Yoga specialist hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher6_bio: David er en internationalt anerkendt yogalærer, der jævnligt gæsteunderviser hos Yoga Bible. Hans dynamiske, energifyldte timer kombinerer intens fysisk praksis med kraftfuld breathwork. Han er også fast underviser hos Hot Yoga Copenhagen.
da.teacher6_quote: Sved er bare din tvivl, der forlader kroppen.
da.teacher6_img_alt: David Osei — Gæsteunderviser hos Yoga Bible
da.values_subtitle: Fælles værdier, der definerer Yoga Bible-oplevelsen
da.value1_desc: Hver underviser bringer ægte viden fra årelang personlig praksis og studier. Vi underviser fra erfaring, ikke kun fra bøger.
da.value2_desc: Vi tilpasser vores undervisning til den enkelte. Uanset dit niveau møder vi dig der, hvor du er, og guider dig videre.
da.value3_desc: Vores undervisere er evige elever. Vi efteruddanner os konstant og bringer ny viden og inspiration til dig.
da.value4_desc: Vi bygger et inkluderende, støttende miljø, hvor alle kan vokse. Yoga Bible er mere end et studie — det er en familie.
da.approach_text: Yoga Bibles undervisere kombinerer traditionel yogavisdom med moderne pædagogik. Vi tror på en integreret tilgang, der forbinder asana, pranayama, filosofi og anatomi til en helhedsorienteret uddannelse.
da.approach1_desc: Maksimalt 20 elever pr. hold sikrer personlig opmærksomhed og dybdegående feedback fra dine undervisere.
da.approach2_desc: Vores undervisere giver individuel, konsenteret vejledning, der hjælper dig med at forstå og mærke hver stilling korrekt.
da.approach3_desc: Vi binder filosofi og anatomi direkte sammen med praksis, så du ikke bare ved hvordan — men også hvorfor.
da.cta_title: Klar til at Lære fra de Bedste?
da.cta_text: Ansøg til Yoga Bibles yogalæreruddannelse og start din rejse med vores erfarne underviserteam.

en.hero_subtitle: Get to know the passionate yoga teachers and mentors behind Yoga Bible. Each team member brings decades of experience, dedication, and a unique approach to your yoga journey.
en.intro_text: At Yoga Bible, we believe a great teacher can transform your practice. Our team is composed of experienced yoga teachers with unique specialties — from vinyasa flow to yin yoga, from pranayama to philosophy. Each teacher brings authentic knowledge, warmth, and a deep commitment to your growth.
en.teacher1_bio: Sarah founded Yoga Bible with a vision to create an authentic, in-depth yoga education in the heart of Copenhagen. Her teaching combines classical yoga philosophy with modern movement science, and she's known for her ability to make complex concepts accessible to everyone.
en.teacher1_quote: Yoga is not about touching your toes — it's about what you learn on the way down.
en.teacher1_img_alt: Sarah Jensen — Lead Instructor at Yoga Bible
en.teacher2_bio: Mikkel brings a unique combination of yoga wisdom and anatomical expertise to the team. With a background in physiotherapy, he ensures every student understands the body's mechanics and can teach safely and effectively. His yin yoga classes are legendary.
en.teacher2_quote: When you understand the body, you understand movement. When you understand movement, you find freedom.
en.teacher2_img_alt: Mikkel Andersen — Senior Teacher at Yoga Bible
en.teacher3_bio: Priya grew up in a yoga family in Rishikesh and has practiced pranayama and meditation since childhood. She brings deep authenticity and generational wisdom to her teaching, guiding students into the transformative power of breath.
en.teacher3_quote: The breath is the bridge between body and mind. Master the breath, and you master yourself.
en.teacher3_img_alt: Priya Sharma — Pranayama Specialist at Yoga Bible
en.teacher4_bio: Jonas is the driving force behind Yoga Bible's popular inversions and handstand courses. With a background in circus arts and acrobatics, he teaches with humor, precision, and an infectious enthusiasm that gets even the most nervous students to go upside down.
en.teacher4_quote: Turning the world upside down doesn't just change your perspective — it changes you.
en.teacher4_img_alt: Jonas Berg — Inversions Specialist at Yoga Bible
en.teacher5_bio: Line creates spaces for deep relaxation and inner stillness. Her restorative classes and yoga nidra sessions are the perfect counterbalance to everyday stress. She also leads Yoga Bible's sought-after retreat programs, guiding participants toward a deeper connection with themselves.
en.teacher5_quote: In the silence, we find the wisdom that noise conceals.
en.teacher5_img_alt: Line Frederiksen — Restorative Yoga Specialist at Yoga Bible
en.teacher6_bio: David is an internationally recognized yoga teacher who regularly guest-teaches at Yoga Bible. His dynamic, high-energy classes combine intense physical practice with powerful breathwork. He's also a regular teacher at Hot Yoga Copenhagen.
en.teacher6_quote: Sweat is just your doubt leaving the body.
en.teacher6_img_alt: David Osei — Guest Teacher at Yoga Bible
en.values_subtitle: Shared values that define the Yoga Bible experience
en.value1_desc: Every teacher brings genuine knowledge from years of personal practice and study. We teach from experience, not just from books.
en.value2_desc: We adapt our teaching to the individual. Whatever your level, we meet you where you are and guide you forward.
en.value3_desc: Our teachers are eternal students. We continuously train and bring new knowledge and inspiration to you.
en.value4_desc: We build an inclusive, supportive environment where everyone can grow. Yoga Bible is more than a studio — it's a family.
en.approach_subtitle: A holistic approach to yoga education
en.approach_text: Yoga Bible's teachers combine traditional yoga wisdom with modern pedagogy. We believe in an integrated approach that connects asana, pranayama, philosophy, and anatomy into a comprehensive education.
en.approach1_desc: A maximum of 20 students per group ensures personal attention and in-depth feedback from your teachers.
en.approach2_desc: Our teachers provide individual, focused guidance that helps you understand and feel each posture correctly.
en.approach3_desc: We connect philosophy and anatomy directly to practice, so you don't just know how — but also why.
en.cta_title: Ready to Learn from the Best?
en.cta_text: Apply to Yoga Bible's yoga teacher training and begin your journey with our experienced teaching team.
